MANOSABA_LIN_ENCHANTMENT_EMAAPPLE_ENCHAN: When you play this card, gain 1 max HP.
When you play this card, gain 1 [b]max HP[/b].
MANOSABA_LIN_ENCHANTMENT_REBUTTAL_ENCHAN:
Played {Amount} cards with Rebuttal this turn.
×1: 1 damage. ×2: Strength. ×3: Vulnerable. ×4: Random hits. ×5: Replay card.

Records how many cards with [b]Rebuttal[/b] were played this turn. Resets each turn.
×1: Deal 1 damage
×2: Gain 1 Strength
×3: Apply 1 Vulnerable to all enemies
×4: Deal 1 damage randomly, counter times
×5: This card plays an additional time
MANOSABA_LIN_ENCHANTMENT_AGREEMENT_ENCHA:
Played {Amount} cards with Agreement this turn.
×1: 3 Block. ×2: 3 Block self. ×3: Temp Dexterity. ×4: Temp Strength. ×5: Free card + Energy.

Records how many cards with [b]Agreement[/b] were played this turn. Resets each turn.
×1: All allies gain 3 Block
×2: Self gains 3 Block
×3: All allies gain 1 temporary Dexterity
×4: All allies gain 2 temporary Strength
×5: Next card is free, all allies gain 1 Energy
MANOSABA_LIN_ENCHANTMENT_DOUBT_ENCHANTME:
Played {Amount} cards with Doubt this turn.
×1: 1 Block. ×2: Draw. ×3: Energy. ×4: Retrieve. ×5: Replay + Enchant.

Records how many cards with [b]Doubt[/b] were played this turn. Resets each turn.
×1: Gain 1 Block
×2: Draw 1 card
×3: Gain 1 Energy
×4: Retrieve 1 random card from discard to hand
×5: Random hand card gains Replay, choose 1 deck card to enchant with Rebuttal/Agreement/Doubt
